title: ApParently
description: I created your childhood trauma in this Minecraft mod (note: this mod is still new and there is more features to be added!)
body:
This is a Minecraft Mod that contains childhood trauma! We have (in the meantime:) a belt, wooden spoon, slipper, and the Angerofthe B! I hope you enjoy!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xj0JebqPQ9M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-the Belt does 101 attack damage, has an attack speed of 5, and is crafted using two leather and an iron ingot.

-the Wooden Spoon Does 50 attack damage, it has a 2 attack speed, and is crafted using two sticks and a log of any type.

-the Slipper does 9998 damage, has an attack speed of 8, and is crafted using leather boots, a water bucket, grass/dirt, a lava bucket, and a bucket.

-the Angerofthe B does 9998 attack damage, has an attack speed of 69, and is crafted using 3 Belts, 4 Wooden Spoons, 1 Slipper, and 1 Diamond Block.
